services.name: Task Service
services.description: Authoritative state gateway for task lifecycle transitions and Spanner updates

services.name: Task Fulfilment Service
services.description: Dispatches tasks and translates declarative scopes to either Sobi or Jetski harnesses

services.name: Feed Service
services.description: Maintains feed timelines and streams Server-Sent Events/WebSockets directly to UI

services.name: Workstream Service
services.description: Validates fine-grained RBAC identities and reconciles Google Group assets

services.name: Memory Service
services.description: Indexes knowledge into isolated stores and runs vector similarity checks

services.name: Sobi Harness (Agency)
services.description: Gemini agent executing reasoning cycles against Workspace APIs with HITL bounds

services.name: Jetski Harness (Capsules)
services.description: Orchestrates container-capsules containing internal developer pipelines and PTY watchdogs

services.name: Memory Dream Cron
services.description: Scheduled worker running DBSCAN sweeps, vector deduping, and morning rollups

tasks.title: Integrate Ingestion Listener webhook for Gmail threads
tasks.description: Enables Ollie Ingestion Service to receive real-time push webhooks for high priority triage.

tasks.title: Design Task Service Spanner DDL & recursive sub-task CTEs
tasks.description: Requires creating the Spanner DDL mapping for hierarchal Tasks table with cycle mitigation logic.

tasks.title: Implement semantic duplicate detection via Vertex embeddings
tasks.description: Computes 768-dimensional gecko embeddings to avoid redundant tasks within Workstream.

tasks.title: Draft dual-identity execution gating specs in Workstream Service
tasks.description: Enforces RBAC verification filters before delegating autonomous tooling execute rights.

facts.title: DBSCAN Vector Clustering Thresholds
facts.content: DBSCAN sweeps operate over 768-dim ScaNN vectors in Memory DB. A pairwise cosine distance epsilon of 0.25 (Cosine similarity >= 0.75) with a minPoints of 3 is utilized for offline clustering consolidation sweeps.
facts.author: Daniel Giuditta

facts.title: Jetski PTY Watchdog Timeout Limits
facts.content: If a compilation process in a capsule hangs without emitting newline tokens for longer than 30 seconds, the PTY watchdog injects a SIGTERM, halts execution, and redirects the agent to run code search instead.
facts.author: Ajay Yadav

facts.title: Workstream Inference Auto-Routing Confidence Values
facts.content: When tasks arrive untriaged, cosine similarity >= 0.85 triggers auto-assignment to a workstream. Sim between 0.65 and 0.85 places tasks in creator's personal canvas with rationales.
facts.author: Belinda Preno

facts.title: Double Identity RBAC Gating Bounds
facts.content: When an agent service account invokes external tools, the Workstream Service gatekeeper checks the initiating user's LDAP credentials. SAs are blocked if the human teammate does not have ROLE_AGENT_DELEGATOR.
facts.author: Simon Sok

facts.title: Workspace MCP Server Thread Synchronization
facts.content: Model Context Protocol (MCP) clients running in Sobi Harness must intercept tool definitions and cross-reference with Active Feed Comments before closing Buganizer issues to prevent split brain loops.
facts.author: Ajay Yadav

facts.title: Style Guidelines for Protobuf Interfaces
facts.content: All google.workspace.ollie gRPC services must cleanly utilize Spanner read-commit timestamps and explicitly map etag values within UpdateTask requests to prevent lost updates.
facts.author: System Bot

facts.title: User Workflow Research Synthesis Notes - NYC Offices
facts.content: U.S. Workspace users co-edit documents frequently. Task management boards with integrated email triggers are preferred. Users seek 'Bottom HITL sign-off' options for outbound communication.
facts.author: Simon Sok
